name: Surf n Sea
tagline: The oldest surf shop in Hawaii (1965) — real surfers sell and rent gear in a colorful Haleiwa waterfront landmark.
parking: Small lot; street parking on Kamehameha Hwy
bestTime: Morning for the best advice on where to surf that day; check the used board section in back
talkStory: Founded in 1965 by Dr. Lowell Chenoweth, a dentist-turned-surfer, Surf N Sea is Hawaii's oldest surf shop and a North Shore institution. The colorful wooden building on the Haleiwa waterfront is one of the most photographed structures on the North Shore. The staff are working surfers who can tell you where the best waves are breaking that day. The used board section in back has deals from departing pros, and the shop sponsors the annual Buffalo Big Board Surfing Classic.
